title: PAN Credential
description: A payment credential containing a funding primary account number (FPAN). Both parties handling PAN credentials (sender and receiver) MUST be PCI DSS compliant. Transmission MUST use HTTPS/TLS with strong cipher suites.

type.description: The credential type identifier for PAN credentials.

expiry_month.description: The month of the card's expiration date (1-12).

expiry_year.description: The year of the card's expiration date.

cvc.description: Card verification code. Include when required by the handler's credential constraint.

constraint.title: PAN Credential Constraint
constraint.description: Constraint entry for the `pan` credential type. `required_fields` is narrowed to PAN credential property names for default machine validation of the current schema shape.
